title: OKE: Kubernetes Attack Overview
description: Rollup of OKE/Kubernetes attack simulation events by stage, technique, severity, and service for dashboard triage.
query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC Application Logs' and 'Service Namespace' = 'octo' and 'Attack ID' like 'attack-oke-*' | stats count as Events, distinctcount('Trace ID') as Traces, distinctcount('Span ID') as Spans by 'Attack Stage', 'MITRE Technique ID', 'Security Severity', 'Service Name' | sort -Events

ask_ai_prompts: Summarize the highest-severity Kubernetes attack stages and the MITRE techniques represented.
